author: lOrm
content: #653 closed. Added /rewind to TIME_TRAVEL section of src/slash_commands.rs::SLASH_SECTIONS. Surfaces in /help and the TUI cheatsheet. Test time_travel_and_management_commands_present pins the entry. Implementation of the message-selector overlay (depends on #520 overlay framework + checkpoint storage) lives under #554; this issue tracked surface registration only.
